title: Compose-time shared contract suggestion (§6.3 layer 3: cross-track duplicate → shared contract)
description: When ≥2 tracks consume a contract that no track produces, emit a human-reviewable suggestion to introduce a contract/shared-lib (single producer, multi-consumer). Does not auto-wire — per §6.3, premature abstraction is worse than duplication. Also add a built-in check shared-contract-audit that reports orphan-consumed contracts.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
